business.name: Elite Roofing
business.tagline: Bainbridge & Seattle GAF Master Elite Roofer
business.serviceArea: Bainbridge Island & North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake
business.about: A premium roofing studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. GAF Master Elite-certified crews, honest inspections, proper underlayment and flashing detail, and storm-response teams on call when the weather finds a weakness.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and replacement with GAF Timberline HDZ architectural shingles or standing-seam metal panel. Proper underlayment, ice-and-water barrier, drip edge, step flashing, and ridge ventilation. Permit pulled, final inspection passed.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.description: Leaks, wind-lifted shingles, failed flashing, damaged vents, and boot replacements. Most repairs same-day. If a repair isn't the right call, we'll tell you — and back it with a written scope either way.

services.name: Storm Damage Response
services.description: Storm-response team on-call through every wind event. Emergency tarp, documented damage photography, and insurance-claim-ready written reports.

services.name: Annual Inspection
services.description: Licensed roofer on the roof. Photo-documented assessment of every flash, vent, fastener, sealant, and drainage point. Written report delivered within 24 hours.

services.name: Seamless Gutters
services.description: On-site formed seamless aluminum or copper gutters with custom downspouts. Leaf-guard options available. Protects the fascia, soffit, and foundation from water damage.

services.name: Skylights + Flashing
services.description: VELUX and Kingspan skylight installation, replacement, and proper re-flashing into existing roof systems. Any flashing-only repairs also welcome.

testimonials.name: Graham H.
testimonials.text: They found two issues the insurance adjuster missed and documented everything properly. Claim went through without a fight. Roof looks like architecture instead of shingles.

testimonials.name: Rita C.
testimonials.text: Asked three companies to bid. Two tried to sell me a full replacement I didn't need. Elite Roofing said it was a flashing repair and fixed it in a day for $700.

testimonials.name: Jim P.
testimonials.text: Storm ripped part of my ridge cap during the windstorm. Their emergency line answered at 11pm, a tarp was on the next morning, full repair by Friday.

testimonials.name: Andrea W.
testimonials.text: Full replacement on our 1920s foursquare. Crew never left debris, never blocked the driveway, and the ridge vents look intentional for once.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: Licensed roofer climbs the roof, photographs every flash, vent, fastener, and sealant, and delivers a written assessment to your inbox — not a sales pitch.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: If it's repairable, we say repairable. No pressure-to-replace. When a replacement is the right call, you'll see photo evidence, not vague claims.

process.title: Replace
process.description: Proper underlayment. Ice-and-water barrier over eaves and valleys. Drip edge, step flashing, ridge venting. GAF Timberline HDZ or standing-seam metal. Permit pulled, inspections passed, job site clean.

process.title: Warranty
process.description: GAF Golden Pledge on full replacements — the strongest shingle warranty in North America. 25 years of workmanship on every install. Active storm-response line for the weather that finds a weakness.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — Elite Roofing's virtual assistant. Quick question: is this a new roof, a repair, a leak, or storm damage?
qualifyingQuestions: Is this a repair, a replacement, or storm damage?
Roughly how old is the current roof?
Do you have an active leak right now?
chatbot.customInstructions: Anchor on honest assessment, proper system installation (underlayment + flashing + ventilation, not just shingles), GAF Master Elite credentials, and storm-response availability — not lowest price. If the user describes symptoms that sound like a repair, keep them steered to the repair path; don't upsell. Urgent tone for active leaks and storm damage.
